text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Say, would everyone like to go on a<n>camping trip
together?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A camp trip? Nice, I could get a lot of<n>relaxing
done.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Camping takes a lot of preparation,<n>though. After
all, we would even have to<n>pitch a tent ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... O-of course, I didn't think about<n>that.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I just happened to see a show about<n>camping on
TV. Getting to see the night<n>sky with everyone
seemed so nice...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it would be too hard for<n>beginners like
us, huh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and of course there's the whole<n>matter of the
campfire to consider. It'd<n>be best to go with
someone more<n>experienced—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but you'd be there, King. You're<n>super
first-rate, so it'd probably be no<n>problem for you
to handle.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
With you around, I bet everything would<n>be
smooth sailing. Right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...R-right! A matter as simple as campingis no trouble at all for me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I need to read up on camping, fast.
